text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: hrs
Date: Wed Nov 26 04:52:01 UTC 2014
New revision: 373439
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/373439

Log:
  Use newly-built binaries first.  When $PATH contains PREFIX/bin, an old
  (maybe broken) binary could be used to generate .fmt files.

  PR:	195396
